utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six of these items are present. Each includes detailed and specific information as requested: property includes address, type, price, neighborhood, school district, and features; financing includes lender, loan terms, down payment, and monthly payments; legal_services includes provider, services, and costs; moving_services includes provider, services, and costs; setup_services includes utilities, inspection, and insurance details; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a purchase property located at 214 Glenashton Drive, Oakville, ON, described as a detached 4+ bedroom family home priced at CAD 925,000. This is a purchase property, not a rental, so it must be mapped to one of the 'purchase_properties' in the ground-truth list. The only purchase property with a similar price point (within the CAD 850K–950K range) and matching family-oriented description is the 'Waterfront Property' (CAD $950K, rating 2). The financing option used was a standard mortgage from RBC, which aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' category (rating 9). The inspection service cost CAD 550, which matches the 'Investment Analysis' (CAD $500, rating 6). The moving service cost CAD 2,800, which best fits 'Corporate Relocation' (CAD $3200, rating 2) since it is the only one in that high cost range.
